use_cases: Date of birth selection in registration forms
Appointment scheduling with intuitive spinning wheel interaction
Travel booking for selecting check-in and check-out dates
Event planning interfaces requiring date selection
Healthcare appointment booking with accessible date picker
ai_summary: A 3D animated date wheel picker component featuring smooth perspective transforms and scrolling interactions. The component renders spinning wheels for month, day, and year selection with 3D rotation effects, opacity gradients, and scale transforms based on scroll position. Supports multiple sizes, configurable year ranges, and localization for month names. Uses Framer Motion for fluid animations and touch-friendly drag interactions.
